name: render_tpb auto-detect

le_5_unreadable_tuplets_post_regen_with_.note: bwv_854=17, maestro=15 (regen used render_tpb=12 by default; v3 item 8 had explicitly forced render_tpb=8 on MAESTRO), mtg_qbh=1, vocadito_1=0 (G-11 fires here)

discard_rationale: Two state checks (pre-Phase-G shipped state, post-Phase-G regen state) both fail the strict <= 5 criterion. G-11's IOI-based heuristic correctly downgrades vocadito_1 to render_tpb=8 (eliminates all unreadable tuplets there) but does not fire on the fast piano demo (BWV 854) or the chamber demo (MAESTRO, where v3 item 8 had explicitly forced render_tpb=8 and Phase G's auto-detect doesn't replicate that override). The structural fix is a two-pass tuplet count (build at tpb=12, count, re-build at tpb=8 if > 1/bar) — Phase H scope.
